creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Looks like that the mixer module doesnt like it.

My elog gets spammed with that which is not is practical.

ERR<7980>: ../src/modules/mixer/lib/emix.c:307 emix_sink_inputs_get() safety check failed: (ctx && ctx->loaded && ctx->loaded->ebackend_sink_inputs_get) is false
